description: Legal document. Fragment (upper left corner of recto). Location: Fustat. Dated: Adar II 1404 Seleucid, which is 1093 CE, under the authority of the Nasi David b. Daniel. On recto no specifics of the case are preserved. On verso there are references to various payments and sums of money, but it is faded and the context is missing.
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
